id.description: Document ID matching the registrant ID

kabKota.description: Kabupaten or Kota in West Sumatra

color.description: HEX color custom generated by AI matching Emerald/Teal themes

ktpBase64.description: Base64 string data of the uploaded KTP for preview

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Daily attendance checkpoints for events with duration > 1 day

day.description: The Bimtek day index of attendance (e.g. 1 to n)

signatureBase64.description: Base64 canvas stroke recording of user digital signature

eventTitle.description: Official title of the Bimtek event

durationDays.description: Total active days of physical event

gasLink.description: External Google Apps Script endpoint url

/registrations/{registrationId}.description: Uniquely indexed database profile lists of Sumatera Barat tourism participants

/attendance/{attendanceId}.description: Dynamic attendance registers per participant and per duration day
